mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.created_at, r.is_default, creator.username AS creator, r.updated_at, COALESCE(updater.username, 'Unknown') AS updater FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user creator ON r.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN sys_user updater ON r.updated_by = updater.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, COALESCE(ur.user_id = #{userId}, false) AS checked FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id AND ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
